title: 10.40.010 - Camping on public property.
snippet: It is unlawful to camp upon any public property owned by the city, including streets and parks.

title: 10.40.020 - Camping on private property.
snippet: Shall not apply to persons camping upon their own land or with written consent of the owner.

title: 10.60.020 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Use of automobiles, campers and trailers for human habitation on public property; overnight camping restrictions.

title: 10.60.030 - Storage of personal property on public and private property.
snippet: Unlawful to store personal property, including camp paraphernalia, except by resolution of the city council.

title: 14-20 - Unlawful Camping.
snippet: Unlawful camping on public property; camping activities constitute a public health and safety hazard.

title: 7-11 - Protection of Critical Infrastructure and Wildfire Risk Areas.
snippet: Unlawful and a public nuisance to camp, occupy camp facilities, or use camp paraphernalia at listed locations.

title: 9.14.045 - Camping prohibited without approval.
snippet: Applies whether or not person is camping or lodging within or without any automobile, van, motor home, trailer coach, or tent.

title: 19.50.030 - Prohibited camping on certain public property.
snippet: City may by resolution prohibit camping or adopt time/place/manner conditions on public properties. New Ch. 19.50 adopted May 2024.

title: 5.60.054 - Camping in city parking garages.
snippet: Camping regulated within City of San Rafael parking garages (Ord. No. 2030, 7-17-2023).

title: 9.14.030 - Camping Prohibited.
snippet: Unlawful to sleep, camp, occupy camp facilities, or use camp paraphernalia on any public road or public property when an alternative is available.

title: 12.25.030 - Park Regulations.
snippet: Camping shall be prohibited in Paradise Community Park.

title: 9.22.020 - Prohibition.
snippet: Unlawful to camp overnight or occupy any recreational vehicle overnight (Chapter 9.22 Camping).

title: Sec. 62-503 - Camping on public property.
snippet: Unlawful to camp, occupy camp facilities or use camp paraphernalia on any public property within the city.

title: Sec. 62-504 - Storage of personal property on public property.
snippet: Unlawful to store personal property, including camp facilities and camp paraphernalia, on any public property.

title: 8.80.030 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Unlawful and a public nuisance to camp, establish/maintain/occupy camp facilities, or use camp paraphernalia (Ch. 8.80 Camping).

title: 8.70.010 - RV parking prohibited.
snippet: Unlawful to park or maintain a recreational vehicle on any public or private non-residential parking (Ch. 8.70 RV Parking).

title: Sec. 50-502 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Unlawful to camp, pitch or occupy camp facilities or use camp paraphernalia in the city, whether on public or private property (Ch. 50 Nuisances, Art. III Camping).

title: Sec. 50-503 - Camping on public property.
snippet: Unlawful to sleep in any camping facility, vehicle, motorhome, recreational vehicle, or vehicle camping trailer parked on public property.

title: Sec. 18-147 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Unlawful to camp, occupy camp facilities or use camp paraphernalia in listed areas (Ch. 18 Art. VIII Camping and Storage of Personal Property).

title: Sec. 18-148 - Storage of personal property in public places.
snippet: Unlawful to store personal property, including camp facilities and camp paraphernalia, except as provided by resolution.

title: 9.48.020 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Unlawful to camp, occupy camp facilities or use camp paraphernalia in listed areas (Ch. 9.48 Camping).

title: 9.48.030 - Storage of personal property in public places.
snippet: Unlawful to store personal property, including camp facilities and camp paraphernalia, except as provided by the city.

title: 12.28.030 - Prohibited activities.
snippet: Unlawful and a public nuisance to camp at listed locations (Ch. 12.28 Protection of Critical Infrastructure and Wildfire Risk Areas).

title: 9.51.030 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Unlawful and a misdemeanor to camp, occupy camp facilities, or use camp paraphernalia in listed areas (Ch. 9.51 Camping and Storage of Personal Property).

title: 9.51.040 - Storage of personal property in public spaces.
snippet: Unlawful and a misdemeanor to store personal property, including camp paraphernalia, in listed areas.

title: Sec. 46-603 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Unlawful to camp or use camp paraphernalia in or on any public park, street, sidewalk or other public property (Art. XII Camping, Sleeping or Storage of Property).

title: Sec. 58-304 - Large-vehicle parking-exception permits.
snippet: Large vehicle parked on public street shall not be used for overnight camping, lodging, sleeping, cooking, or any residential use.

title: 11.96.030 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Unlawful to camp, sleep in or occupy camp facilities or use camp paraphernalia in listed areas (Ch. 11.96 Local Camping).

title: 11.96.040 - Storage of personal property in public places.
snippet: Unlawful to store personal property, including camp facilities and camp paraphernalia, in listed areas.

title: Sec. 10-402 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Unlawful to camp, occupy camp facilities or use camp paraphernalia in listed areas (Ch. 10 Art. VIII Camping and Storage of Personal Property).

title: Sec. 10-403 - Storage of personal property in public places.
snippet: Unlawful to store personal property, including camp facilities and camp paraphernalia, except as provided by resolution.

title: 9.24.030 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Camping restrictions on public and private property (Ch. 9.24 Camping on Public and Private Property).

title: 9.24.060 - Storage of personal property.
snippet: Unlawful to store or leave unattended camp facilities or camp paraphernalia on public or private property.

title: 8.24.010 - Camping prohibited at certain times and places.
snippet: Tent camping and all classes of recreational vehicle camping prohibited along Embarcadero Road and other areas (Ch. 8.24 Camping).

title: 9.40.030 - Prohibited acts.
snippet: Unlawful and a public nuisance to camp, occupy camp facilities, or use camp paraphernalia in listed areas (Ch. 9.40 Unlawful Camping).
